name: Charles Patel

current_profile.summary: Junior litigation associate with 5 years experience; strong reasoning, writing, and compliance familiarity. Has used e-discovery tools (predictive coding) and understands legal risk frameworks. No formal programming; minimal ML knowledge.
current_profile.ai_experience: Used e-discovery tools with predictive coding

learning_intent: Wants to work at the intersection of law and AI—helping organizations deploy AI safely and in compliance. Goal: gain enough data/ML and evaluation skill to audit models, interpret risks, and translate findings to legal stakeholders.

target_jd.title: Data Scientist (AI Governance / Model Risk) - Legal Domain
requirements: Assess AI systems for legal/compliance risk; design monitoring and audit processes
Partner with engineers to implement controls for privacy, bias, and security
Develop evaluation plans and documentation for regulators and internal review
Communicate model limitations and risk tradeoffs to non-technical stakeholders

expected_skill_gaps.description: Python basics, data handling, and SQL fundamentals to work with datasets. REST/API concepts to understand deployed systems.
Eval types, tracing, prompt/model regression testing, and A/B testing basics.
Policy-to-controls mapping; PII handling and retention; data minimization.
Prompt injection and data leakage awareness (as relevant to LLM deployments).
Faithfulness evaluation and grounded citations for legal research assistants.
